Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Path of Black Flame]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — The Path of Black Flame was stolen from ancient dragons and is the art of pure destruction.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — The Path of Black Flame is also commonly called the Blackflame Path or the Path of Black Flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — The Blackflame Path is a path Eithan can teach Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon has not learned any Striker techniques on the Path of Black Flame yet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 15''' — The Enforcer Trial was designed to test a single disciple on the Path of Black Flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 15''' — The Path of Black Flame is associated with ruthless destruction.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 22''' — The Path of Black Flame is something people try to revive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 22''' — The Path of Black Flame is a path that can be revived.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — The Path of Black Flame's sacred artists imitate the power of a tribe of black dragons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — The Path of Black Flame is a path Lindon follows.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — The Path of Black Flame has a famous variation of dragon's breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — The Path of Black Flame has a basic aura cycling technique used for recovery.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — The damage from the Path of Black Flame is adding up for Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — the Path of Black Flame is an offensive Path.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — The Path of Black Flame has good cards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon's Path of Black Flame has advanced into Highgold.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 2''' — The Path of Black Flame is not suited for taking prisoners.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — The Path of Black Flame is known to erode the mind, body, and soul.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon cycles the Path of the Black Flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — The Path of Black Flame is a path that can cause the Ruler technique to detonate when torn between two spirits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — The Path of Black Flame needs to be able to punch through strong defenses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — The Path of Black Flame was absorbed by Lindon from Naian.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — The Path of Black Flame burns away the physical form.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon fills himself with the Path of Black Flame.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — The Path of Black Flame caused damage to Orthos's memories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — The Path of Black Flame is associated with madra corruption.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 13''' — Orthos seeks power on the Path of Black Flame to advance.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Noroloth has insights into the Path of Black Flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — A script was written specifically to hold back the Path of Black Flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Noroloth has been giving pointers to those wishing to learn the Path of Black Flame.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — The Path of Black Flame is not well-suited for defense.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
